title: Resolution Tree
description: Structured synthesis of an atomic claim debate, recording where agreement was reached, where disagreement remains, and which textual or hermeneutical priors the remaining divergence depends on.

citation.description: A supporting citation anchoring a resolution-tree node in scripture or historical sources.

reference.description: Canonical verse reference or historical source locator.

text_quoted.description: Optional quoted text excerpt supporting this branch.

original_language.description: Original language of the quoted source when applicable.

weight.description: Relative evidentiary weight assigned to the citation within this branch.

divergence_point.description: Precise localization of where profiles or traditions part ways in the argument.

label.description: Short human-readable label for the divergence point.

description.description: Explanation of the precise move or decision at which agreement breaks.

reference.description: Optional canonical reference, source location, or profile path.

depends_on.description: Declaration of what this node's synthesis depends on.

references.description: References, profile paths, or identifiers naming the dependencies.

blocking_prior.description: The explicit prior preventing further convergence at this branch.

description.description: What unstated or stated prior blocks agreement.

profiles_affected.description: Profile identifiers implicated by this blocking prior.

profile_outcome.description: How a given profile or profile cluster lands at a specific branch or conclusion.

profile_id.description: Profile identifier, or a profile-cluster identifier if grouping traditions.

node_id.description: Identifier of the node where this profile currently terminates.

rationale_summary.description: Brief explanation of why this profile lands here.

tree_node.description: A node in the resolution tree.

node_id.description: Unique identifier for this node within the tree.

node_type.description: The role this node plays in the resolution tree.

summary.description: Human-readable synthesis of this node's state.

status.description: How firm this branch currently is.

divergence_point.description: Where agreement gives way to disagreement, if applicable.

blocking_prior.description: The explicit prior preventing further convergence at this branch, if any.

supporting_evidence.description: Primary-source anchors for this synthesis node.

counter_evidence.description: Important surviving evidence or objections that keep this branch contested.

profiles_in_scope.description: Profiles actively represented at this branch.

children.description: Child branches flowing from this node.

notes.description: Additional explanatory commentary for maintainers or site rendering.

id.description: A unique identifier for this resolution tree.

claim_id.description: The atomic claim this tree resolves.

claim_statement.description: Human-readable restatement of the atomic claim.

status.description: Current publication status of the resolution tree.

resolution_summary.description: Top-level synthesis of where the debate currently stands.

source_debates.description: Debate transcripts from which this tree was synthesized.

author_model.description: Model that authored or synthesized this tree.

run_id.description: Run identifier or path if available.

commit_sha.description: Commit SHA current at generation time if available.

prompt_reference.description: Path or identifier for the prompt set used to generate the tree.

profile_outcomes.description: Per-profile mapping to the branch or conclusion each profile currently reaches.

metrics.description: Convergence and contestation metrics associated with this resolution tree.

stability_score.description: Frequency of the same synthesis across independent reseedings.

depth_of_consensus.description: How deep into the tree agreement extends before meaningful divergence.

prior_dependence.description: Profile axes this tree's key branches are sensitive to.

contestation_score.description: Measure of the quality and persistence of surviving objections.

drift_score.description: Observed change across model versions, prompts, or corpus revisions.

notes.description: Freeform notes about how metrics were assessed.

version_history.description: Chronological record of modifications to this resolution tree.
